title: Thread Metadata
description: Schema for thread metadata.json files containing thread configuration and state

short_description.description: Brief description of the thread's purpose or content (optional)

thread_id.description: Unique identifier for the thread instance

user_public_key.description: Public key of the user who owns the thread

workflow_base_uri.description: Reference to the workflow that initiated this thread (e.g., 'sys:system/workflow/write-workflow.md')

session_id.description: Original session ID from the provider

session_path.description: Path to the original session file (optional)

imported_at.description: When this session was imported into the Base system

provider_metadata.description: Provider-specific metadata preserved from the original session

raw_data_saved.description: Whether the raw imported data has been saved

inference_provider.description: Name of the AI provider being used (e.g., 'ollama', 'anthropic')

models.description: Array of model names used in the thread

tools_used.description: Array of tool names used during the session

bash_commands_used.description: Array of bash commands executed during the session

thread_state.description: Current lifecycle state of the thread

archived_at.description: Timestamp of archival (ISO 8601) - only present if thread_state is 'archived'

archive_reason.description: Reason for thread archival - 'completed' for successful completion, 'user_abandoned' for user-initiated abandonment

tools.description: Array of tools available to this thread

git_branch.description: Git branch name associated with this thread (format: 'thread/{thread_id}')

system_worktree_path.description: Path to the Git worktree for the system repository

user_worktree_path.description: Path to the Git worktree for the user repository

message_count.description: Total number of messages in this thread

tool_call_count.description: Total number of tool calls made in this thread

user_message_count.description: Total number of user messages in this thread

assistant_message_count.description: Total number of assistant messages in this thread

input_tokens.description: Total number of input tokens consumed in this thread

output_tokens.description: Total number of output tokens generated in this thread

cache_creation_input_tokens.description: Total number of input tokens used for cache creation in this thread

cache_read_input_tokens.description: Total number of input tokens read from cache in this thread

tags.description: Array of categorization tags following base-uri format (e.g., 'user:tag/project-alpha')

tags_user_set.description: Whether tags were manually set by the user. When true, automatic tag analysis will skip this thread.

tags_analyzed_at.description: Timestamp when automatic tag analysis was last performed (ISO 8601). Prevents duplicate analysis runs.

public_read.description: Whether this thread can be read by anyone without authentication. Only affects read access - write operations are always limited to owner.

relations.description: Array of entity relations in format 'relation_type [[base_uri]]' (e.g., 'accesses [[user:task/my-task.md]]')

relations_analyzed_at.description: Timestamp when relation analysis was last performed (ISO 8601). Prevents duplicate analysis runs.

file_references.description: Array of file base_uris accessed during the thread session, extracted from timeline analysis

directory_references.description: Array of directory base_uris accessed during the thread session, extracted from timeline analysis

relations_cleanup_at.description: Timestamp when relation cleanup was last performed (ISO 8601)

session_status.description: Current session lifecycle status for web-client-initiated sessions

prompt_snippet.description: First 200 characters of the user prompt for display in the sessions panel

job_id.description: BullMQ job ID for queue correlation with the session creation job
